title: Rewrite imperative_report_builder as a pipe-first module
prompt: Refactor both functions in test_fixtures/imperative_report_builder.ex. `build/1` should pipe `orders |> Enum.filter(&(&1.status == "completed")) |> Enum.reduce(%{subtotal: 0, count: 0}, ...) |> then(&Map.merge(&1, %{tax: ..., grand_total: ...}))`. `format_lines/1` uses `Enum.map_join/3`. Both must be pipe pipelines. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.ReportBuilder do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Two distinct pipe patterns across one module. Requires recognizing the non-mutation bug AND picking Enum.map_join.
